sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42206" key="e)rgola/beia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐργολάβ-εια</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n42206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐργολαβία</ref> </xr> II, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῶν μειρακίων</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making profit out of</tr_> them, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
